zh.Samlesbury Hall, Preston, Lancashire, En: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Molyneux於大約1423年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親Richard Molyneux28歲，母親Joan Haydock38歲。他和Elizabeth Stanley至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1459年9月23日享年37歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾澤福頓。

zh-hans.Samlesbury Hall, Preston, Lancashire, En: 英国英格兰藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Molyneux于大约1423年出生在英国藍卡爾澤福頓时，他的父亲Richard Molyneux28岁，母亲Joan Haydock38岁。他和Elizabeth Stanley至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1459年9月23日享年37岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾澤福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Molyneux was born about 1423, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard Molyneux, was 28 and his mother, Joan Haydock, was 38. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Elizabeth Stanley. He died on 23 September 1459, at the age of 37, and was buried in Sefton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Molyneux est né environ 1423, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Molyneux, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Haydock, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Elizabeth Stanley. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1459, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Molyneux um 1423 in Sefton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Molyneux 28 und seine Mutter Joan Haydock 38. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Stanley mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. September 1459 im Alter von 37 Jahren und wurde in Sefton, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Molyneux è nato il circa 1423 nel Sefton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Richard Molyneux, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan Haydock, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Elizabeth Stanley. Morì il 23 settembre 1459, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Sefton, Lancashire, England.

ja.Samlesbury Hall, Preston, Lancashire, En: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Molyneuxが約1423年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Richard Molyneuxは28歳，母Joan Haydockは38歳であった。彼はElizabeth Stanleyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1459年9月23日に37歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアセフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Molyneux(이)가 대략 1423년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Molyneux(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Haydock(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Stanley(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 9월 23일 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Samlesbury Hall, Preston, Lancashire, En: Samlesbury, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Molyneux nasceu aproximadamente 1423, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Molyneux, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Haydock, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Elizabeth Stanley. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1459, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Molyneux родился около 1423 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Molyneux было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Haydock, 38. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Elizabeth Stanley. Он умер 23 сентября 1459 г. в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Molyneux nació aproximadamente 1423, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Molyneux, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan Haydock, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Elizabeth Stanley. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1459, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
